items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of switching modality from in-person to remote if sick.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of switching modality (in-person to remote if sick), but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this specific functionality is implemented or tested. While the linked use case mentions the ability for a student to switch to virtual if feeling ill, the prior steps do not provide any concrete evidence of this capability being executed or verified. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
